signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Fully Resolved, Triggering XRP Surge Above $1
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Fully Resolved, Triggering XRP Surge Above $1.50 | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

The SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, removing a major regulatory overhang that suppressed XRP's price for years and enabling institutional adoption.[1][2] This resolution, circulating through institutional channels in early April 2026, drove a 10% weekly gain,

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Volume Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Volume Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk's tweet counts**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (priced at 32% for 220-239 range) and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (18-28% for 1120-1159 range), with over $19-21M in trading volume across 20-131 related markets[2][3][4].
